abstract: Pass/fail review gate for Zod schema code in TypeScript and TanStack Start apps: two blind reviewers judge a diff or file set against 24 decidable rules across silent Zod 3-to-4 semantic breaks, removed APIs, error customization and formatting, deprecated method forms, composition and codecs, TanStack Start integration, and packaging. Pinned to zod 4.4.x and the TanStack Start v1 RC.
